description: Style Note baggit was founded in 1990 and since then has created a name in the market for fighting against cruelty to animals. A practical and stylish choice of bag in black with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this synthetic leather bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit. Product Details Black bag with one main zipped compartment that has an inner zipped pocket One zipped pocket on the front One long adjustable handle for carrying ease A flap design with a concealed magnetic buttoned closure over the zipped compartments One zipped pocket at the back A pleated design on the front and branding on the back Material and Care Synthetic leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight Size Height: 21 cm Width: 19 cm Depth: 6 cm
